TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Rukai, story: RukaiNr-frog_Baqingyi

S.FORM: la lapu pikay ki dididrungu ku takurauru.
S.TRANSL: 然後(他)養了一隻青蛙在罐子裡。
Then (he) kept a frog in a small jar.

S.FORM: la ikay kudra taupungu ini.
S.TRANSL: 有一隻他的狗。
There is a dog.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: sa sipi yaie ala katuase ubelre kuini takurauru twalay ki didilringu.
S.TRANSL: 當(小男孩)作夢的時候，然後那隻青蛙就逃離了。
When (the boy) was dreaming, then that frog escaped and left.

S.FORM: kuini taupungu sa thingale la kela dreele.
S.TRANSL: 當狗知道的時候，就來看。
When that dog knew (it), (he) then came to see.

S.FORM: muainu la iya si pua puadringi ku aulru ini ki didilrungu si.
S.TRANSL: 然後說：「去哪裡了咧？」，然後就把他的頭鑽進罐子裡。
then said “where did it go?” and put his head into the small jar.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: la alealeale.
S.TRANSL: 然後一直叫
then (kept) woofing.

S.FORM: la pacunu kuini lasu la dreele.
S.TRANSL: 那個男生就起來看。
That boy then awoke to see.

S.FORM: la dreele kuini ki taupungu kudra yakay ki… kiarethe ki didilrungu ku lre ini.
S.TRANSL: 然後看到他的狗的脖子被小罐子勒住。
Then see that his dog’s neck was strangled in the small jar.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: la mua ralubu si la e la mualraane.
S.TRANSL: 然後(他)過去幫忙，然後拿掉(罐子)。
Then (he) went to help (it) and… then moved (it) away.

S.FORM: la kiragay si kirimu alra ililuku kuini ki taupungu.
S.TRANSL: 他就很開心，很快地把狗帶走了。
Then (he) was happy, and suddenly took the dog away.

S.FORM: sa ka kayane la katuase tarudrusa kuini ki taupungu mulregelrege.
S.TRANSL: 隔天，他們兩個一起去山上
The next day, they went to the mountain together.

S.FORM: la dreele ku sigu sa dreele ki sigu kuini taupungu la aleale.
S.TRANSL: 然後當狗看到虎頭蜂的時候，就一直叫
Then when that dog saw the hornet, (it) kept woofing.

S.FORM: sa aleale kuini taupungu kuini sigu la kirimu kainganay ungungung si mutaluvayvay.
S.TRANSL: 那隻大蜜蜂突然出來然後一直嗡嗡嗡。
That hornet then suddenly came out and (kept) buzzing.

S.FORM: la mutaluvayvay si.
S.TRANSL: 然後(他們)就出來了。
Then (they) came out and…

S.FORM: la ucilri kuini sigu.
S.TRANSL: 蜜蜂就掉下來了。
That hornet fell down.

S.FORM: la mua kuini la la sigu muadringi kuini ki cekele lini.
S.TRANSL: 虎頭蜂就飛進他們的部落。
The hornet then (went) into the tribe.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱複數.附著屬格

S.FORM: la katuase.
S.TRANSL: 就離開了
Then left.

S.FORM: sa e la kilangedre kuini waaleale kuini taupungu.
S.TRANSL: 當(小男孩)被叮的時候，狗就一直叫。
When (the boy) was stung, the dog kept woofing.

S.FORM: kuini lasu kuini lrulay ala dreele kuini adrisi.
S.TRANSL: 那個男孩……那個……嬰兒然後看到老鷹。
That boy…that…baby then see that eagle.

S.FORM: la muadreke.
S.TRANSL: 然後就跌倒了。
Then (he) stumbled over.

S.FORM: ikay kuini la e sa muadreke kuini lrulay la katuase wamua ku mia ki lregelrege ku e lrenege.
S.TRANSL: 當跌倒的時侯，那個小孩就離開去那個很像山的石頭。
There, when (the boy) stumbled over, that boy left to the stone that is like a mountain.

S.FORM: la mua si.
S.TRANSL: 然後就走
then go and…

S.FORM: la kiraysi la ka lawngu ki salawnguane.
S.TRANSL: 然後就被鹿的角掛起來。
then (he) was hung by the deer’s horn.

S.FORM: sa kiraysi kuini ki lawngu ki salawnguane kuini salawnguane la kainganay ngidrakale.
S.TRANSL: 當被鹿角掛起來的時候，那個鹿就站了起來。
When (he) was hung by the deer’s horn, that deer got up.

S.FORM: la katuase laylay.
S.TRANSL: 然後跑離。
then left running.

S.FORM: sa katuase laylay kay lasu si kuini taupungu la tarudrusa muadreke ki tukadrane.
S.TRANSL: 當跑離時，小男孩和那隻狗一起跌落懸崖。
when (the deer) left running, the boy and that dog fell off the cliff together.

S.FORM: la uthene ki kadrawane.
S.TRANSL: 然後就沉入河裡。
then (they) sank in the river.

S.FORM: sa uthene ala madradresenge si.
S.TRANSL: when sinking and then

S.FORM: sa ngidrakale kuini lasu la tarumalra kuini taupungu si.
S.TRANSL: 當那個男生起身，就接住了狗。
when that boy got up, then catch the dog and…

S.FORM: la mua si mukameameale.
S.TRANSL: 然後就去到旱地。
then (they) went to the dry land.

S.FORM: si kikaruburu kuini ki angatu mukameamealeane.
S.TRANSL: 然後連同木頭一起去到旱地。
and went with the wood to the dryland.
